metadata.name: fivetran_platform__audit_table
metadata.comment: Table replacing the deprecated `fivetran_audit` table. Each record represents a table written  to during a connection sync, tracking timestamps and row counts. Note: Row counts may differ  from the deprecated `fivetran_audit`, which reported pre-duplicate data loads.

connection_id.name: connection_id
connection_id.comment: System generated unique ID of the connection.

schema_name.name: schema_name
schema_name.comment: Name of the schema. If not provided, the `connection_name` is used.

table_name.name: table_name
table_name.comment: Name of the table being written to during the sync.

destination_id.name: destination_id
destination_id.comment: Foreign key referencing the destination receiving data from the connection.

destination_name.name: destination_name
destination_name.comment: Name of the destination receiving data from the connection.

write_to_table_start.name: write_to_table_start
write_to_table_start.comment: Timestamp when Fivetran started writing to the table during a sync.

write_to_table_end.name: write_to_table_end
write_to_table_end.comment: Timestamp when Fivetran finished writing to the table during a sync.

sync_start.name: sync_start
sync_start.comment: Timestamp when the connection-level sync began writing or modifying records in the table.

sync_end.name: sync_end
sync_end.comment: Timestamp when the connection-level sync successfully completed writing or modifying records in the table.

sum_rows_replaced_or_inserted.name: sum_rows_replaced_or_inserted
sum_rows_replaced_or_inserted.comment: Total number of rows replaced or inserted into the table during a sync.

sum_rows_updated.name: sum_rows_updated
sum_rows_updated.comment: Total number of rows updated in the table during a sync.

sum_rows_deleted.name: sum_rows_deleted
sum_rows_deleted.comment: Total number of rows deleted from the table during a sync.

unique_table_sync_key.name: unique_table_sync_key
unique_table_sync_key.comment: Primary key of the table, hashed on `schema_name`, `connection_id`, `destination_id`, `table_name`, and `unique_table_sync_key`.

write_to_table_start_day.name: write_to_table_start_day
write_to_table_start_day.comment: The `write_to_table_start` field truncated to the `day`, used for partitioning with the `insert_overwrite` incremental method.

has_stats.label: Has Stats?
has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

metadata.name: fivetran_platform__audit_user_activity
metadata.comment: Table of user-triggered actions in a Fivetran instance for audit-trail purposes.  Helps trace actions to [log events](https://fivetran.com/docs/logs#logeventlist) such as  schema changes, sync frequency updates, manual updates, broken connections, etc.

date_day.name: date_day
date_day.comment: Date on which the user action occurred.

day_name.name: day_name
day_name.comment: Abbreviated weekday name of the date when this user action occurred (e.g., Mon, Tue, Wed).

day_of_month.name: day_of_month
day_of_month.comment: Day of the month when this user action occurred (e.g. 2022-03-06 --> 6).

occurred_at.name: occurred_at
occurred_at.comment: Timestamp when the event was logged.

destination_name.name: destination_name
destination_name.comment: UI-facing name of the destination where the user action was made.

destination_id.name: destination_id
destination_id.comment: Foreign key referencing the destination where the user action was made.

connection_name.name: connection_name
connection_name.comment: Name of the connection with which the user interacted.

connection_id.name: connection_id
connection_id.comment: Foreign key referencing the `connection` with which the user interacted.

email.name: email
email.comment: Account email of the user who triggered the action.

first_name.name: first_name
first_name.comment: Given name of the user who triggered the action.

last_name.name: last_name
last_name.comment: Surname of the user who triggered the action.

user_id.name: user_id
user_id.comment: Foreign key referencing the `user` who triggered the action.

destination_role.name: destination_role
destination_role.comment: The acting user's permissions for this individual destination.

event_type.name: event_type
event_type.comment: High-level event category. Possible values include `WARNING`, `ERROR`, and `INFO`, with `INFO` being typical for user-triggered actions.

event_subtype.name: event_subtype
event_subtype.comment: The routine involved in the log event, defined [here](https://fivetran.com/docs/logs#logevents).

message_data.name: message_data
message_data.comment: The details of the event in a JSON-like string format.

log_id.name: log_id
log_id.comment: Unique ID of the log record.

has_stats.label: Has Stats?
has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

metadata.name: fivetran_platform__connection_daily_events
metadata.comment: Table of each connection's daily history, tracking the number of API calls, schema changes, and records  modified since the connection's setup date.

date_day.name: date_day
date_day.comment: Date when API call metrics were recorded for the connection.

connection_id.name: connection_id
connection_id.comment: System generated unique ID of the connection.

connector_type.name: connector_type
connector_type.comment: The kind of connector (e.g. Google Sheets, Webhooks).

destination_name.name: destination_name
destination_name.comment: Name of the destination receiving data from the connection.

destination_id.name: destination_id
destination_id.comment: Foreign key referencing the destination receiving data from the connection.

count_api_calls.name: count_api_calls
count_api_calls.comment: The number of API call events recorded for the connection on the given day.

count_record_modifications.name: count_record_modifications
count_record_modifications.comment: The total number of records modified, including updates, inserts, and deletes.

count_schema_changes.name: count_schema_changes
count_schema_changes.comment: The number of schema change events for the connection.

has_stats.label: Has Stats?
has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

metadata.name: fivetran_platform__connection_status
metadata.comment: Table of connections for each destination, including connection details and sync status.

connection_id.name: connection_id
connection_id.comment: System generated unique ID of the connection.

connector_type.name: connector_type
connector_type.comment: The kind of connector (e.g. Google Sheets, Webhooks).

destination_id.name: destination_id
destination_id.comment: Foreign key referencing the destination receiving data from the connection.

destination_name.name: destination_name
destination_name.comment: Name of the destination receiving data from the connection.

connection_health.name: connection_health
connection_health.comment: Current sync and connection status of the connection. Possible values include  `broken`, `deleted`, `incomplete`, `connected`, `paused`, `initial sync in progress`, and `priority first sync`.

last_successful_sync_completed_at.name: last_successful_sync_completed_at
last_successful_sync_completed_at.comment: Timestamp of the most recent successful sync completion.

last_sync_started_at.name: last_sync_started_at
last_sync_started_at.comment: Timestamp of the most recent sync initiation. Data arriving after this timestamp is not included in the sync.

last_sync_completed_at.name: last_sync_completed_at
last_sync_completed_at.comment: Timestamp of the most recent sync completion, regardless of success or failure.

set_up_at.name: set_up_at
set_up_at.comment: Timestamp when the connection was set up.

number_of_schema_changes_last_month.name: number_of_schema_changes_last_month
number_of_schema_changes_last_month.comment: The number of schema changes (creating tables or schemas and altering tables) in the past 30 days.

number_errors_since_last_completed_sync.name: number_errors_since_last_completed_sync
number_errors_since_last_completed_sync.comment: The number of errors logged since the last completed sync.

number_warnings_since_last_completed_syn.name: number_warnings_since_last_completed_sync
number_warnings_since_last_completed_syn.comment: The number of warnings logged since the last completed sync.

has_stats.label: Has Stats?
has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

metadata.name: fivetran_platform__mar_table_history
metadata.comment: Table of monthly active rows (MAR) for each table across connections, destinations, and schemas, per month. Read more about MAR definitions and calculations [here](https://fivetran.com/docs/getting-started/consumption-based-pricing).

connection_name.name: connection_name
connection_name.comment: Name of the connection loading the table.

schema_name.name: schema_name
schema_name.comment: Name of the schema containing the table.

table_name.name: table_name
table_name.comment: Name of the table for which MAR was measured.

destination_id.name: destination_id
destination_id.comment: Foreign key referencing the destination receiving data from the connection.

measured_month.name: measured_month
measured_month.comment: Month of the MAR measurement, formatted as YYYY-MM-01.

last_measured_at.name: last_measured_at
last_measured_at.comment: Timestamp when the last MAR measurement for the month was made.

free_monthly_active_rows.name: free_monthly_active_rows
free_monthly_active_rows.comment: The number of free active rows measured in the table for the month.

paid_monthly_active_rows.name: paid_monthly_active_rows
paid_monthly_active_rows.comment: The number of paid active rows measured in the table for the month.

total_monthly_active_rows.name: total_monthly_active_rows
total_monthly_active_rows.comment: The total number of active rows measured in the table for the month.

connector_type.name: connector_type
connector_type.comment: The kind of connector (e.g. Google Sheets, Webhooks).

connection_id.name: connection_id
connection_id.comment: System-generated unique ID of the connection loading the table.

destination_name.name: destination_name
destination_name.comment: Name of the destination as it appears in the UI.

has_stats.label: Has Stats?
has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

metadata.name: fivetran_platform__schema_changelog
metadata.comment: Table of schema changes for each connection, including table alterations, table creations, schema configuration changes, and schema creations.

connection_id.name: connection_id
connection_id.comment: System generated unique ID of the connection.

connection_name.name: connection_name
connection_name.comment: Name of the connection whose schema was changed.

destination_id.name: destination_id
destination_id.comment: Foreign key referencing the destination receiving data from the connection.

destination_name.name: destination_name
destination_name.comment: Name of the destination receiving data from the connection.

created_at.name: created_at
created_at.comment: Timestamp when the schema change was written.

event_subtype.name: event_subtype
event_subtype.comment: Type of schema change event. Possible values include 'alter_table', 'create_table', 'change_schema_config', and 'create_schema'.

message_data.name: message_data
message_data.comment: The details of the event in a JSON-like string format.

table_name.name: table_name
table_name.comment: Name of the table if it was altered or created.

schema_name.name: schema_name
schema_name.comment: Name of the schema if it was created.

has_stats.label: Has Stats?
has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

metadata.name: fivetran_platform__usage_history
metadata.comment: Table of each destination's usage and active volume per month, including usage per million MAR and MAR per usage.  Usage is measured in dollars or credits, depending on the customer's pricing model.  Read more about the relationship between usage and MAR [here](https://www.fivetran.com/legal/service-consumption-table).\

measured_month.name: measured_month
measured_month.comment: Month of the usage/MAR measurement, formatted as YYYY-MM-01.

destination_id.name: destination_id
destination_id.comment: Foreign key referencing the destination receiving data from the connection.

destination_name.name: destination_name
destination_name.comment: Name of the destination as it appears in the UI.

credits_spent.name: credits_spent
credits_spent.comment: The number of credits used by the destination in the given month.

dollars_spent.name: dollars_spent
dollars_spent.comment: The dollar amount used by the destination in the given month.

free_monthly_active_rows.name: free_monthly_active_rows
free_monthly_active_rows.comment: The number of free active rows measured in the destination for the given month.

paid_monthly_active_rows.name: paid_monthly_active_rows
paid_monthly_active_rows.comment: The number of paid active rows measured in the destination for the given month.

total_monthly_active_rows.name: total_monthly_active_rows
total_monthly_active_rows.comment: The total number of active rows measured in the destination for the given month.

paid_model_runs.name: paid_model_runs
paid_model_runs.comment: The number of paid model runs for the destination in the given month.

free_model_runs.name: free_model_runs
free_model_runs.comment: The number of free model runs for the destination in the given month.

total_model_runs.name: total_model_runs
total_model_runs.comment: The total number of model runs for the destination in the given month.

credits_spent_per_million_mar.name: credits_spent_per_million_mar
credits_spent_per_million_mar.comment: The ratio of credits spent per million active rows synced in the given month.

mar_per_credit_spent.name: mar_per_credit_spent
mar_per_credit_spent.comment: The ratio of the active volume to credits spent in the given month.

amount_spent_per_million_mar.name: amount_spent_per_million_mar
amount_spent_per_million_mar.comment: The ratio of amount spent per million active rows synced in the given month.

mar_per_amount_spent.name: mar_per_amount_spent
mar_per_amount_spent.comment: The ratio of the active volume to amount spent in the given month.

has_stats.label: Has Stats?
has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

metadata.name: stg_fivetran_platform__account
metadata.comment: Table of information about this Fivetran account.

created_at.name: created_at
created_at.comment: Timestamp when the account was created.

has_stats.label: Has Stats?
has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

metadata.name: stg_fivetran_platform__connection
metadata.comment: Table of all connections loading data into destinations. Deleted connections  remain in the table but can be identified by having an older `_fivetran_synced` timestamp.

connection_id.name: connection_id
connection_id.comment: System-generated unique ID of the connection.

connection_name.name: connection_name
connection_name.comment: Name of the connection. This may differ from `incremental_mar.schema_name`.

connector_type.name: connector_type
connector_type.comment: Type of connection (e.g., Google Sheets, Webhooks).

destination_id.name: destination_id
destination_id.comment: Foreign key referencing the destination receiving data from the connector.

connecting_user_id.name: connecting_user_id
connecting_user_id.comment: Foreign key referencing the user who set up the connection.

is_paused.name: is_paused
is_paused.comment: Boolean indicating whether the connector's sync is currently paused.

set_up_at.name: set_up_at
set_up_at.comment: Timestamp when the connector was set up.

is_deleted.name: is_deleted
is_deleted.comment: Boolean indicating whether the connection has been deleted.

has_stats.label: Has Stats?
has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

has_stats.label: Has Stats?
has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

metadata.name: stg_fivetran_platform__credits_used
metadata.comment: Table of the credits used by the customer per month for each destination.

destination_id.name: destination_id
destination_id.comment: Foreign key referencing the destination where credits were used.

measured_month.name: measured_month
measured_month.comment: Month when the credits were consumed, formatted as `YYYY-MM`.

credits_spent.name: credits_spent
credits_spent.comment: The total credits used by the destination in the given month.

has_stats.label: Has Stats?
has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

metadata.name: stg_fivetran_platform__destination
metadata.comment: Table of destinations receiving data. Each declared source has one record.

account_id.name: account_id
account_id.comment: Foreign key referencing the Fivetran account associated with the destination.

created_at.name: created_at
created_at.comment: Timestamp when the destination was set up.

has_stats.label: Has Stats?
has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

metadata.name: stg_fivetran_platform__destination_membership
metadata.comment: Table of users given access to this destination.

destination_id.name: destination_id
destination_id.comment: Foreign key referencing the destination to which the user belongs.

user_id.name: user_id
user_id.comment: Foreign key referencing the user with access to the destination.

activated_at.name: activated_at
activated_at.comment: Timestamp when the user was activated in the destination.

joined_at.name: joined_at
joined_at.comment: Timestamp when the user was added to the destination.

destination_role.name: destination_role
destination_role.comment: The user's permissions for this individual destination.

has_stats.label: Has Stats?
has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

metadata.name: stg_fivetran_platform__incremental_mar
metadata.comment: Table of monthly active row (MAR) measurements recorded per table and date. Each measurement is cumulative for the month and includes all MAR types (paid, free, etc.).

connection_name.name: connection_name
connection_name.comment: Name of the measured connection. Coalesced with the DEPRECATED fields `connector_name` and `connector_id`.

destination_id.name: destination_id
destination_id.comment: Foreign key referencing the destination of the measured table.

free_type.name: free_type
free_type.comment: Indicates the type of free MAR, or `PAID` for paid MAR.

measured_date.name: measured_date
measured_date.comment: Timestamp when the MAR measurement was recorded.

schema_name.name: schema_name
schema_name.comment: Name of the schema containing the measured table.

sync_type.name: sync_type
sync_type.comment: Indicates whether the MAR calculation is based on a historical or incremental sync.  Possible values include `HISTORICAL`, `INCREMENTAL`, and `UNKNOWN`.

table_name.name: table_name
table_name.comment: Name of the table for which MAR was measured.

updated_at.name: updated_at
updated_at.comment: Timestamp when the record was last updated.

_fivetran_synced.name: _fivetran_synced
_fivetran_synced.comment: Timestamp when the record was last synced.

incremental_rows.name: incremental_rows
incremental_rows.comment: The number of new distinct primary keys synced for the connection on the given day.

has_stats.label: Has Stats?
has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

has_stats.label: Has Stats?
has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

metadata.name: stg_fivetran_platform__log
metadata.comment: Table of logged events related to data syncs. More info on error logs  [here](https://fivetran.com/docs/logs/fivetran-log#errorlogs).

log_id.name: log_id
log_id.comment: Unique ID of the log record.

sync_id.name: sync_id
sync_id.comment: Identifies which sync the event is associated with.

created_at.name: created_at
created_at.comment: Timestamp when the event was logged.

connection_id.name: connection_id
connection_id.comment: System-generated unique ID of the logged connection. Coalesced with the DEPRECATED field `connector_id`.

event_type.name: event_type
event_type.comment: High-level event category. Possible values include `WARNING`, `ERROR`, and `INFO`.

message_data.name: message_data
message_data.comment: The details of the event in a JSON-like string format.

event_subtype.name: event_subtype
event_subtype.comment: The routine involved in the log, defined [here](https://fivetran.com/docs/logs#logevents).

transformation_id.name: transformation_id
transformation_id.comment: Foreign key referencing the transformation if the event is related to a transformation run.

has_stats.label: Has Stats?
has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

has_stats.label: Has Stats?
has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

metadata.name: stg_fivetran_platform__transformation_runs
metadata.comment: Table of all transformation runs executed by Fivetran.

_fivetran_synced.name: _fivetran_synced
_fivetran_synced.comment: Timestamp when the record was last synced.

destination_id.name: destination_id
destination_id.comment: Foreign key referencing the destination where the transformation run was executed.

free_type.name: free_type
free_type.comment: Indicates the type of free model run, or `PAID` for paid model runs.

job_id.name: job_id
job_id.comment: Unique key referencing the job associated with the transformation run.

job_name.name: job_name
job_name.comment: Name of the transformation job that was executed.

measured_date.name: measured_date
measured_date.comment: Date in UTC when the transformation was executed.

model_runs.name: model_runs
model_runs.comment: Number of models run during the transformation.

updated_at.name: updated_at
updated_at.comment: Timestamp when the record was last updated.

measured_month.name: measured_month
measured_month.comment: Month when the transformation occurred, formatted as `YYYY-MM`.

has_stats.label: Has Stats?
has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

metadata.name: stg_fivetran_platform__usage_cost
metadata.comment: Table of the amount spent by the customer per month for each destination. Amount is represented in USD.

destination_id.name: destination_id
destination_id.comment: Foreign key referencing the destination where costs were incurred.

measured_month.name: measured_month
measured_month.comment: Month when the costs were incurred, formatted as `YYYY-MM`.

dollars_spent.name: dollars_spent
dollars_spent.comment: The total amount spent by the destination in the given month.

has_stats.label: Has Stats?
has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

metadata.name: stg_fivetran_platform__user
metadata.comment: Table of users given access to this Fivetran account.

user_id.name: user_id
user_id.comment: Unique ID of the user's account.

created_at.name: created_at
created_at.comment: Timestamp when the user was created.

has_disabled_email_notifications.name: has_disabled_email_notifications
has_disabled_email_notifications.comment: Boolean indicating whether the user has disabled all email notifications.

phone.name: phone
phone.comment: Phone number associated with the user.

is_verified.name: is_verified
is_verified.comment: Boolean indicating whether the user has verified their email address.
